name: Double Fudge Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine, milk, salt, and vanilla until fluffy.
2. Stir in cocoa and sugar replacement. Knead or work with hands until dough is smooth.
3. Form dough into 60 small balls.
4. Dip each ball first in chocolate, then cool completely.
5. Repeat dipping process and cooling for additional coating.
